rect.style: opacity: 1; fill-opacity: 1; fill-rule: nonzero; stroke: none; stroke-width: 5; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-miterlimit: 4; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(132, 126, 237);
